/usr/bin/cc  -O3 -flto -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/windham_argonbench_native.dir/argon_bench.c.o CMakeFiles/windham_argonbench_native.dir/library/Argon2/argon2.c.o CMakeFiles/windham_argonbench_native.dir/library/Argon2/blake2b.c.o CMakeFiles/windham_argonbench_native.dir/library/Argon2/core.c.o CMakeFiles/windham_argonbench_native.dir/library/Argon2/encoding.c.o CMakeFiles/windham_argonbench_native.dir/library/Argon2/opt.c.o CMakeFiles/windham_argonbench_native.dir/library/Argon2/thread.c.o -o windham_argonbench_native
